student.home.heroDesc: Start with the pre-test, then wait for your teacher to unlock lessons so everyone progresses together.
student.home.unlockedWithPost: You can access lesson content and take the Post-Test.
student.home.unlockedNoPost: You can access lesson content (Post-Test is still locked).
student.home.lockedDesc: You will see Home and Pre-Test until your teacher unlocks lessons.
student.home.step1.title: Read the quick guide
student.home.step1.desc: This page explains how to start — no extra setup required.
student.home.step2.title: Take the pre-test
student.home.step2.descRequired: Answer 10 questions based on your current knowledge — no pressure if you cannot answer yet.
student.home.step2.descOptional: Pre-Test is optional but recommended to measure baseline knowledge.
student.home.step3.title: Wait for teacher to unlock
student.home.step3.desc: Once unlocked, you can study content and take the post-test.
student.home.note.title: Note for students
student.home.note.body: This system measures understanding before and after learning. Answer the Pre-Test honestly based on what you already know.
student.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
student.faq.q1: What if lessons are still locked?
student.faq.a1: Ask your teacher to unlock lessons from the teacher page. Status updates automatically after a moment.
student.faq.q2: Can I use a phone or tablet?
student.faq.a2: Yes. The layout adapts to vertical cards and larger touch targets.
student.faq.a3Required: Yes. Your teacher requires Pre-Test before lessons.
student.faq.a3Optional: Not required, but recommended to measure baseline knowledge.
student.faq.a4Open: Post-Test is open — complete lessons then take it.
student.faq.a4Closed: Wait for your teacher to enable Post-Test after lessons.
student.locked.title: This section is locked
student.locked.bodyRequired: Complete the pre-test and wait for your teacher to unlock lessons.
student.locked.bodyOptional: Wait for your teacher to unlock lessons to continue.
